## Summary
- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Loop / Traceability
- Loop ID: <!-- e.g. RLOOP-015 -->

## Validation Checklist
- [ ] `yarn lint` passed locally
- [ ] `yarn typecheck` passed locally
- [ ] Loop ID (`RLOOP-XXX`) is included in branch name and/or commit message
- [ ] Related docs were added/updated (`README.md`, `docs/*`, or N/A)

## Additional Notes
- Risks / rollout notes
- Screenshots (if UI change)
